description: Q4 EPS missed consensus by 18%; guidance cut for next year.
Hawk Ridge filed 13D disclosing 6.4% stake.
FY guidance cut for second time this fiscal year.
Say-on-pay support fell to 71%; binding vote in next AGM cycle.
Wall Street Journal published critical capital allocation feature.
Long-tenured independent director announced retirement.
Announced $8B upstream acquisition; mixed analyst reaction.
Rumored CEO succession plan under review by board.
Stock dropped 12% in one week on streaming subscriber miss.
Analyst speculation of strategic review/sale process.
Q3 missed top-line by 3% but reaffirmed FY guide.
Audit chair announced retirement effective AGM.
Net interest margin guidance trimmed.
Q2 earnings beat; raised guidance.
$3B buyback authorization approved.
Climate-disclosure shareholder proposal reached 38% support.
12-month stock down 22%; underperformed peers by 18%.
Board reportedly evaluating CEO succession.
Say-on-pay 65% support; below majority advisory comfort.
Trident Engaged disclosed 2.4% stake and intent to seek strategic review.
